description: Sporting a skater-inspired design, the nike Renzo 2 is a durable sneaker with great looks and feel. Heavily cushioned, this is an absolutely stylish and no-fuss sneaker making it a great lifestyle wear. Upper Panelled suede and synthetic leather upper for durability and comfort Synthetic leather strip along the back collar for extra snug Fit Perforated upper for maximum ventilation Symmetrical lacing system for snug fit and protection from chaffing Synthetic laces for durability Heavily padded tongue for enhanced comfort and snug fit Plush cushioned sockliner for extra in-step comfort and snug fit Reinforced suede overlay along the forefoot region for extra durability and protection nike swoosh on side panels Midsole Cushioned footbed for comfort and impact protection EVA midsole for durability and shock absorption Outsole High quality rubber outsole for enhanced durability Herringbone pattern on outsole for maximum stability and traction with a pivot point at the big toe region of the outsole shoe care Do not machine wash Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
